title: Chewy Indulgent Earthy Toor Dal Stir-fry
description: A chewy and indulgent American dish featuring toor dal that is earthy in flavor with a touch of richness suitable for kosher meals.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp Garam Masala (optional for extra flavor)
2 tbsp Water (for soaking dal and cooking the dish)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Drain soaked toor dal and add it to the pan. Stir well for about 2 minutes.
Sprinkle garam masala (if using) and salt into the mixture, stirring continuously.
Stir in toasted flax seeds and water until everything is moistened evenly.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for another 5-10 minutes or until the dal absorbs all the liquid.
Adjust seasoning if necessary. Serve hot.
